'''ngogayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobeliaceous|lobeliaceous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobeliaceous|lobeliaceous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngogayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogayithi|ngogayithi]] || [[word:ngogayiji|ngogayiji]] || [[word:ngogayishi|ngogayishi]] || [[word:ngogayiki|ngogayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogayuthuthu|ngogayuthuthu]] || [[word:ngogayujuju|ngogayujuju]] || [[word:ngogayushushu|ngogayushushu]] || [[word:ngogayukuku|ngogayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogayuthu|ngogayuthu]] || [[word:ngogayuju|ngogayuju]] || [[word:ngogayushu|ngogayushu]] || [[word:ngogayuku|ngogayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogayufthuf|ngogayufthuf]] || [[word:ngogayufjuf|ngogayufjuf]] || [[word:ngogayufshuf|ngogayufshuf]] || [[word:ngogayufkuf|ngogayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogayethe|ngogayethe]] || [[word:ngogayeje|ngogayeje]] || [[word:ngogayeshe|ngogayeshe]] || [[word:ngogayeke|ngogayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogayothotho|ngogayothotho]] || [[word:ngogayojojo|ngogayojojo]] || [[word:ngogayoshosho|ngogayoshosho]] || [[word:ngogayokoko|ngogayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogayotho|ngogayotho]] || [[word:ngogayojo|ngogayojo]] || [[word:ngogayosho|ngogayosho]] || [[word:ngogayoko|ngogayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogayofthof|ngogayofthof]] || [[word:ngogayofjof|ngogayofjof]] || [[word:ngogayofshof|ngogayofshof]] || [[word:ngogayofkof|ngogayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogayïfthïf|ngogayïfthïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfjïf|ngogayïfjïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfshïf|ngogayïfshïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfkïf|ngogayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogayïfthïfthïf|ngogayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfjïfjïf|ngogayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfshïfshïf|ngogayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfkïfkïf|ngogayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogayïfthïf|ngogayïfthïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfjïf|ngogayïfjïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfshïf|ngogayïfshïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfkïf|ngogayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogayïfthïf|ngogayïfthïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfjïf|ngogayïfjïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfshïf|ngogayïfshïf]] || [[word:ngogayïfkïf|ngogayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogayæthæ|ngogayæthæ]] || [[word:ngogayæjæ|ngogayæjæ]] || [[word:ngogayæshæ|ngogayæshæ]] || [[word:ngogayækæ|ngogayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogayathatha|ngogayathatha]] || [[word:ngogayajaja|ngogayajaja]] || [[word:ngogayashasha|ngogayashasha]] || [[word:ngogayakaka|ngogayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogayatha|ngogayatha]] || [[word:ngogayaja|ngogayaja]] || [[word:ngogayasha|ngogayasha]] || [[word:ngogayaka|ngogayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogayafthaf|ngogayafthaf]] || [[word:ngogayafjaf|ngogayafjaf]] || [[word:ngogayafshaf|ngogayafshaf]] || [[word:ngogayafkaf|ngogayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngogayasha|ngogayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogayshësha|ngogayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogayrosha|ngogayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogaymusha|ngogaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogayasha|ngogayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogaynkshësha|gongogaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogaynkrosha|gongogaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogaynkmusha|gongogaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogaynkyasha|gongogaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngogagayasha|ngogagayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogagayshësha|ngogagayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogagayrosha|ngogagayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogagaymusha|ngogagaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogagayasha|ngogagayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogagaynkshësha|gongogagaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogagaynkrosha|gongogagaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogagaynkmusha|gongogagaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogagaynkyasha|gongogagaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngegæyasha|ngegæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngegæyshësha|ngegæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngegæyrosha|ngegæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngegæymusha|ngegæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngegæyasha|ngegæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongegæynkshësha|gongegæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongegæynkrosha|gongegæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongegæynkmusha|gongegæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongegæynkyasha|gongegæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngogfayasha|ngogfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogfayshësha|ngogfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogfayrosha|ngogfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogfaymusha|ngogfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogfayasha|ngogfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogfaynkshësha|gongogfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogfaynkrosha|gongogfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogfaynkmusha|gongogfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogfaynkyasha|gongogfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
